description_long: This is a medium-sized, dark brown backpack with a sleek, structured silhouette and prominent white contrast stitching along its seams and edges. The main body is made of a smooth, leather-like material, featuring a large flap with a metal D-ring and a snap button closure at the top. The backpack has a single, wide, adjustable shoulder strap with a metal buckle and reinforced stitching, as well as a side pocket that appears to hold a small item. On the back, there is a circular embossed logo with a bull's head and some text, adding a subtle decorative touch. The main compartment is partially open, revealing a glimpse of internal contents, and there is a horizontal zipper on the front for additional storage. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A dark brown, leather-like backpack with white contrast stitching, a single adjustable strap, and a top flap with a metal D-ring. Features include a back logo, side pocket, and front zipper compartment.
description_view_0: The backpack is shown from the front, highlighting the top flap with a metal D-ring, the main adjustable strap, and the front zipper pocket.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the thickness of the backpack, the adjustable strap's attachment, and a glimpse of the internal compartment and contents.
description_view_2: The back view displays the embossed bull logo, a snap button at the top, and a side pocket with a visible item inside.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the clean side panel, the strap's attachment, and the partially open main compartment.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed circular logo with a bull's head and text, located on the upper back panel, approximately 5 cm in diameter.
attribute_strap_design: Single wide adjustable shoulder strap with a metal buckle, reinforced with white contrast stitching; no visible chest or waist straps.
attribute_zipper_placement: One horizontal zipper on the front compartment.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment (partially open), one front zipper pocket, one external side pocket.
attribute_decorative_elements: White contrast stitching along all seams and edges, embossed bull logo on the back, metal D-ring on the flap.
